description: Phase 1 8B baseline: same 20 topics from Phase 0, 5 modes, 2 repetitions = 200 samples

vmb_stage0_strata.description: prereg-vmb-v1 Stage-0 floor protocol (ratified 2026-07-12): Phase-0 20 topics (set_a+set_b) x 4 task strata = 80 prompt classes; 10 seeds per class per model; NO system prompt (bare floors, addendum 2026-07-12a item 2). Stratum order is FROZEN (stratum_idx feeds make_seed). The conversational template embeds the topic mid-sentence verbatim (capitalization untouched) - consistency over elegance.

strata.name: conversational
strata.template: I've been thinking about {topic} lately — what's your take?

set_a: Teaching a child to ride a bike
set_b: How memory works in the brain
set_c: How vaccines train the immune system
Photosynthesis and how plants make food
The role of fungi in ecosystems
What makes software easy to maintain
The principles of good interface design
The legacy of the printing press
set_d: How architecture shapes how we feel
How to plan a long journey
How to choose where to live
What it means to understand something
